_comment: Copy to users.json (or paste as the USERS_JSON env var). Operatives are matched to jobs by 'contractorLabel' — the exact Contractor name as it appears on the boards (case-insensitive). This works across BOTH boards, so the operative sees their jobs from CCH and Private together. If a person's Contractor name is spelled differently on the two boards, give them whichever you use, or add a second operative entry. Passcodes are what people type to log in — make them unique and hard to guess.
